title: Hide Previous
text: Hide Previous Form property that determines whether open forms are removed from the display when this form is run. True or False (Default). Value Description True Previous forms are removed from the display. This does not cause the previous forms to be dropped from memory; they simply do not appear on the screen. False Previous forms remain in the display. Description Any previous open forms that also have the Hide Previous property as True are not removed from the display. Applies To Form Related Links $HIDE_ALL_PREVIOUS_FORMS Hide all previous forms when the current form is being displayed. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
